svg.aria-label: Sixteen photographs arranged in a ring. On the left, exhaustive matching compares every pair, drawing 120 lines into a dense tangle. On the right, sequential matching compares each photograph only with its near neighbours in capture order, drawing a thin band around the ring.

g.text: every pair — 120 comparisons for 16 photos, 500,000 for 1,000
near neighbours in capture order only — grows linearly
